title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: NORTH BY NORTHEAST COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic primary care, including women’s health exams such as breast exams and Pap tests, care for chronic conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes, treatment for minor illnesses and injuries, and immunizations. Does not provide care for medical emergencies. 714 NE Alberta Street Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Ages 18-64 who have Oregon Health Plan (OHP) with a primary focus on African American community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm by appointment only Email (503) 287-4932 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 287-4932 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Medicaid card or state ID card, if available AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 6 and 72. Small off-street parking lot is available to the west of the building (enter on 7th). However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
